mapper.sql: notice_id, title, category, content, cover_image, top_flag, status, publish_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag
mapper.update: UPDATE jst_notice SET title = #{title}, category = #{category}, content = #{content}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, top_flag = #{topFlag}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId} AND del_flag = '0' AND status IN ('draft', 'offline')

UPDATE jst_notice SET status = #{newStatus}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId} AND del_flag = '0' AND status = #{expectedStatus}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM jst_notice WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId} AND del_flag = '0' AND status = 'published' LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM jst_notice WHERE del_flag = '0' AND status = 'published' AND top_flag = 1 ORDER BY publish_time DESC, notice_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
